name: autoresearch
purpose: Gather and structure external facts when repo truth is not enough.
rules: Do not trigger when repo truth already answers the question.
warnings: Secondary summaries may distort technical facts.
blockers: Only weak or untrusted sources support a high-risk recommendation.
examples: Check official docs before claiming a native Copilot package surface.
degrades_to: Local recommendation with uncertainty note and no external fetches.
authority_boundary: May recommend and cite. It may not convert speculation into verified platform support.
